svg.title: Quarantine remediation loop
svg.desc: Shows how quarantined records flow from the SQS FIFO quarantine queue through manual review using dynamo_ops_queries, to remediation via re-upload to S3 landing, then through the normal Lambda validation pipeline back to Bronze. The file_arrival standard queue has its own DLQ for Lambda processing failures — separate from the quarantine FIFO.

g.text: FIFO · 14-day retention · bad records land here from Lambda

svg.text: separate from quarantine — Lambda processing failures only
